title: pelargonium × nanum
intro: Pelargonium × nanum, also known as Dwarf or Rock Rose, is a compact, flowering plant species belonging to the Geraniaceae family. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a popular remedy for digestive issues, wounds, and skin problems. The health benefits of Pelargonium × nanum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, coughs, and respiratory issues.
